name: Bing's Golf Barn
about: Bing's Golf Barn is a private indoor golfing experience and training facility located in Hanover, MA. Founded by David Bingham, a Class A PGA Professional with over 25 years of industry experience, the venue operates as a custom-built barn designed for year-round golf. It offers private lessons, group sessions, and custom club fittings, utilizing technology like the Foresight GCQuad Launch Monitor and Sportsbox 3D video analysis. David also builds custom backyard spaces, accommodating home gyms, offices, and personal simulators. The facility provides a focused, personalized environment for players looking to improve their game through professional coaching and advanced swing analysis.
why_golfers_like_it: Access to PGA professional instruction with 25+ years of experience
3D video analysis using Sportsbox AI technology for detailed swing insights
Custom Titleist club fitting sessions tailored to individual player needs
Private indoor facility allowing for year-round golf regardless of weather
Foresight GCQuad launch monitor for precise shot data and analysis

food_and_drink.notes: No alcohol service mentioned; BYOB policy not specified

simulator_hardware.notes: Professional-grade launch monitor for shot analysis

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The facility provides club rentals for fitting sessions and lessons. For practice sessions, you can use your own clubs or utilize the available equipment.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: There is no mention of on-site food or drink service. BYOB policy is not specified, but as a private facility, it may be permissible.

faq.question: How long does an 18-hole simulator session take?
faq.answer: Standard lesson packages are 1-hour sessions. The time for a full 18-hole simulation would depend on the number of players and pace of play.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: The venue does not specifically advertise kid-friendly features or junior programs, though it may accommodate children during family lessons.
